requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery-Pack Safety — GSO IEC 62133 (BSMD/GSO Adoption of IEC 62133)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯及电池组安全——GSO IEC 62133（BSMD/GSO采纳IEC 62133）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯及電池組安全——GSO IEC 62133（BSMD/GSO採納IEC 62133）

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs (including power banks) entering Bahrain are assessed for safety against the GSO-adopted version of IEC 62133 (commonly IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems). BSMD, under MOIC, adopts GSO standards, which in turn transpose IEC standards into the GCC region. A test report demonstrating conformity to GSO IEC 62133 from an accredited laboratory is the core safety evidence; where the product or its host equipment is in a regulated/registration scope, BSMD/GSO conformity documentation must accompany market placement. The product must also be safe for a 230 V, 50 Hz mains environment where it includes a mains charger or is sold with one. Additional GSO/IEC safety standards (e.g., IEC 62368-1 for the associated electronic equipment / charger) may apply to the host device.
summary.zh: 进入巴林的便携式锂电芯及电池组（含移动电源）按GSO采纳版本的IEC 62133（锂系统通常为IEC 62133-2）进行安全评估。MOIC下属BSMD采纳GSO标准，而GSO将IEC标准转化至海湾地区。来自认可实验室、证明符合GSO IEC 62133的检测报告是核心安全证据；当产品或其主机设备处于受监管/注册范围内时，投放市场须附BSMD/GSO符合性文件。若产品含市电充电器或随附充电器销售，还须在230伏、50赫兹市电环境下安全。其他GSO/IEC安全标准（如配套电子设备/充电器适用的IEC 62368-1）可能适用于主机设备。
summary.zht: 進入巴林的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組（含行動電源）按GSO採納版本的IEC 62133（鋰系統通常為IEC 62133-2）進行安全評估。MOIC下屬BSMD採納GSO標準，而GSO將IEC標準轉化至海灣地區。來自認可實驗室、證明符合GSO IEC 62133的檢測報告是核心安全證據；當產品或其主機設備處於受監管/註冊範圍內時，投放市場須附BSMD/GSO符合性文件。若產品含市電充電器或隨附充電器銷售，還須在230伏、50赫茲市電環境下安全。其他GSO/IEC安全標準（如配套電子設備/充電器適用的IEC 62368-1）可能適用於主機設備。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62133 (GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2) — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Lithium systems
GSO IEC 62368-1 (where applicable to the associated charger / host electronic equipment)

summary.en: China's baseline portable lithium battery safety standard is GB 31241-2022, the mandatory national safety standard for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment. GB 31241 is technically related to IEC 62133 in scope but is a distinct Chinese national standard with its own test clauses and is administered domestically by SAC/SAMR. For certain rechargeable battery product categories sold in China, CCC certification (which may reference GB 31241) is mandatory. A GB 31241 report is the typical Chinese-side safety document held by exporters.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池安全的基准标准是GB 31241-2022，即用于便携式电子设备的便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池的强制性国家安全标准。GB 31241在范围上与IEC 62133技术相关，但属于具有自身检测条款的独立中国国家标准，由SAC/SAMR在国内管理。对在中国销售的某些可充电电池产品类别，CCC认证（可能引用GB 31241）为强制性。GB 31241报告是出口商通常持有的中国侧安全文件。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池安全的基準標準是GB 31241-2022，即用於便攜式電子設備的便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池的強制性國家安全標準。GB 31241在範圍上與IEC 62133技術相關，但屬於具有自身檢測條款的獨立中國國家標準，由SAC/SAMR在國內管理。對在中國銷售的某些可充電電池產品類別，CCC認證（可能引用GB 31241）為強制性。GB 31241報告是出口商通常持有的中國側安全文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) for applicable rechargeable battery categories sold domestically

gap.en: A Chinese GB 31241 test report is not the document Bahrain/GSO recognises. BSMD/GSO conformity is assessed against GSO IEC 62133 (the GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2), so the exporter typically needs an IEC 62133-2 test report from a laboratory acceptable to the conformity route (often supported by an IECEE CB Scheme certificate that can be converted to the GSO national differences). The gap is twofold: (1) re-testing or report conversion from GB 31241 to GSO IEC 62133 / IEC 62133-2; and (2) where the host device or charger is in scope, an IEC 62368-1 report and GSO conformity for the charger operating at 230 V, 50 Hz. GB 31241 and CCC are not recognised by BSMD and do not substitute for GSO-based conformity.
gap.zh: 中国GB 31241检测报告并非巴林/GSO认可的文件。BSMD/GSO符合性按GSO IEC 62133（GSO采纳的IEC 62133-2）评估，故出口商通常需要来自符合性路径可接受实验室的IEC 62133-2检测报告（常以可转化为GSO国家差异的IECEE CB体系证书支持）。差距有二：（1）将GB 31241重新检测或报告转化为GSO IEC 62133 / IEC 62133-2；（2）当主机设备或充电器在范围内时，须提供IEC 62368-1报告及在230伏、50赫兹运行的充电器的GSO符合性。GB 31241与CCC不被BSMD认可，不能替代以GSO为基础的符合性。
gap.zht: 中國GB 31241檢測報告並非巴林/GSO認可的文件。BSMD/GSO符合性按GSO IEC 62133（GSO採納的IEC 62133-2）評估，故出口商通常需要來自符合性路徑可接受實驗室的IEC 62133-2檢測報告（常以可轉化為GSO國家差異的IECEE CB體系證書支持）。差距有二：（1）將GB 31241重新檢測或報告轉化為GSO IEC 62133 / IEC 62133-2；（2）當主機設備或充電器在範圍內時，須提供IEC 62368-1報告及在230伏、50赫茲運行的充電器的GSO符合性。GB 31241與CCC不被BSMD認可，不能替代以GSO為基礎的符合性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — BSMD/GSO conformity to GSO IEC 62133 (IEC 62133-2) is the core safety basis for regulated lithium battery products entering Bahrain; charger/host-equipment safety (IEC 62368-1) applies where relevant
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically — GB 31241 safety compliance applies to portable lithium batteries; CCC mandatory for applicable rechargeable battery categories sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain assesses lithium cell and pack safety against GSO IEC 62133 (the GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2), not China's GB 31241. A Chinese exporter should obtain an IEC 62133-2 test report (ideally via an IECEE CB Scheme certificate convertible to GSO national differences) and, where the charger or host device is in scope, an IEC 62368-1 report and GSO conformity for the 230 V, 50 Hz charger. GB 31241 and CCC are not recognised by BSMD and do not substitute for GSO-based conformity. Confirm the exact accepted laboratory and conformity route with BSMD/MOIC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林按GSO IEC 62133（GSO采纳的IEC 62133-2）评估锂电芯及电池组安全，而非中国GB 31241。中国出口商应取得IEC 62133-2检测报告（最好通过可转化为GSO国家差异的IECEE CB体系证书），并在充电器或主机设备在范围内时提供IEC 62368-1报告及230伏、50赫兹充电器的GSO符合性。GB 31241与CCC不被BSMD认可，不能替代以GSO为基础的符合性。请向BSMD/MOIC确认具体可接受的实验室及符合性路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林按GSO IEC 62133（GSO採納的IEC 62133-2）評估鋰電芯及電池組安全，而非中國GB 31241。中國出口商應取得IEC 62133-2檢測報告（最好透過可轉化為GSO國家差異的IECEE CB體系證書），並在充電器或主機設備在範圍內時提供IEC 62368-1報告及230伏、50赫茲充電器的GSO符合性。GB 31241與CCC不被BSMD認可，不能替代以GSO為基礎的符合性。請向BSMD/MOIC確認具體可接受的實驗室及符合性路徑。
